name: Baked Rock Cornish Gaame Hen
recipeInstructions:
1. If thawed, stuff the hens with 1/4 cup stuffing each.
2. Season the hens to taste with salt and pepper.
3. Place the breast side up on a rack in a shallow roasting pan.
4. Brush the hens well with butter.
5. Roast uncovered at 400°F for about 45 minutes, or until tender.
6. During the last 15 minutes of baking, baste several times with a mixture of consomme and corn syrup.
